duplicationFindings: Engineering Core scripts are mostly thin wrappers over EngineeringCoreRelease/EngineeringCoreVerification tools.
Validation artifact scripts and regeneration scripts overlap orchestration shape but remain stable operator/CI wrappers.
ISO52016 script surface is wrapper-heavy and mostly delegates to Iso52016Verification tool.
